"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\Txt_Parser.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\Txt_Parser.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Txt_Parser.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\c++.exe    -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Txt_Parser.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o Txt_Parser.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTxt_Parser.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Txt_Parser.dir\linklibs.rsp
